_names: team/per_hero/damage_rank use the VICTORY-SCREEN display names; resolve to champions.name via lib/champion-names.js before sim use (e.g. Ezio→Ezio Auditore, Pelops→Pelops the Victor, Bambus→Bambus Fourleaf).

expected.failure_location_note: Risk is concentrated in Wave 2, NOT the boss. A temporary death occurred in wave 2 and was recovered by a revive; the team reached Round 3 (boss) intact. A boss-only score misses this.

qa_notes: This fixture is the OUTPUT half of a golden battle (result + timeline + per-hero totals). It becomes fully RUNNABLE once all five exact builds are captured for THIS Dragon team.

The sim (SIM_WAVES=1) currently predicts a WAVE-1 WIPE for this team — golden says WIN with all 5 alive at 150t. That mismatch is the recorded finding: survival is under-modelled (Perfect-Veil untargetable on Ezio; Lifesteal gear on Pelops; heavy healing from Tagoar), and 3/5 champs still lack coeffs.
Damage is DoT-dominated over 150 turns; Bambus (top, ~506k) has no coeff in our data.
